  "oldString": "        elif os == \"windows\":\n            # TODO (huydhn): Only build CUDA 12.9 for Linux. This logic is to be cleaned up\n            # in 2.10\n            windows_cuda_arches = CUDA_ARCHES.copy()\n            windows_cuda_arches.remove(\"12.9\")\n            arches += windows_cuda_arches\n    if libtorch_variants is None:",
  "originalFile": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\n\"\"\"Generates a matrix to be utilized through github actions\n\nWill output a condensed version of the matrix if on a pull request that only\nincludes the latest version of python we support built on three different\narchitectures:\n    * CPU\n    * Latest CUDA\n    * Latest ROCM\n    * Latest XPU\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport re\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional\n\n\nSCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).absolute().parent\nREPO_ROOT = SCRIPT_DIR.parent.parent\n\n\nCUDA_ARCHES = [\"12.6\", \"12.8\", \"13.0\"]\nCUDA_STABLE = \"12.8\"\nCUDA_ARCHES_FULL_VERSION = {\n    \"12.6\": \"12.6.3\",\n    \"12.8\": \"12.8.1\",\n    \"13.0\": \"13.0.0\",\n}\nCUDA_ARCHES_CUDNN_VERSION = {\n    \"12.6\": \"9\",\n    \"12.8\": \"9\",\n    \"13.0\": \"9\",\n}\n\nROCM_ARCHES = [\"7.0\", \"7.1\"]\n\nXPU_ARCHES = [\"xpu\"]\n\nCPU_AARCH64_ARCH = [\"cpu-aarch64\"]\n\nCPU_S390X_ARCH = [\"cpu-s390x\"]\n\nCUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES = [\"12.6-aarch64\", \"12.8-aarch64\", \"13.0-aarch64\"]\n\n\nPYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS = {\n    \"12.6\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==12.9.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.6.80; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu12==9.10.2.21; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas-cu12==12.6.4.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufft-cu12==11.3.0.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-curand-cu12==10.3.7.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusolver-cu12==11.7.1.2; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparse-cu12==12.5.4.2; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparselt-cu12==0.7.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.27.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink-cu12==12.6.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile-cu12==1.11.1.6; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"12.8\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==12.9.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu12==9.10.2.21; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas-cu12==12.8.4.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufft-cu12==11.3.3.83; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-curand-cu12==10.3.9.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusolver-cu12==11.7.3.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparse-cu12==12.5.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparselt-cu12==0.7.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.27.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink-cu12==12.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile-cu12==1.13.1.3; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"13.0\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==13.0.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc==13.0.88; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime==13.0.96; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti==13.0.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu13==9.13.0.50; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas==13.1.0.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufft==12.0.0.61; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-curand==10.4.0.35; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusolver==12.0.4.66; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparse==12.6.3.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparselt-cu13==0.8.0; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu13==2.28.9; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu13==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx==13.0.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink==13.0.88; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile==1.15.1.6; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"xpu\": (\n        \"intel-cmplr-lib-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-cmplr-lib-ur==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-cmplr-lic-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-sycl-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"oneccl-devel==2021.17.1; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"oneccl==2021.17.1; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"impi-rt==2021.17.0; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"onemkl-license==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-blas==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-dft==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-lapack==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-rng==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-sparse==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"dpcpp-cpp-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-opencl-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"mkl==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"intel-openmp==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"tbb==2022.3.0 | \"\n        \"tcmlib==1.4.1 | \"\n        \"umf==1.0.2 | \"\n        \"intel-pti==0.15.0\"\n    ),\n}\n\n\n# Used by tools/nightly.py\nPYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL = \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly\"\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    \"cpu\": dict(\n        name=\"cpu\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/cpu\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\", \"macOS\", \"Windows\"],\n        accelerator=\"cpu\",\n    )\n}\nCUDA_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    f\"cuda-{major}.{minor}\": dict(\n        name=f\"cuda-{major}.{minor}\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/cu{major}{minor}\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\", \"Windows\"],\n        accelerator=\"cuda\",\n    )\n    for major, minor in (map(int, version.split(\".\")) for version in CUDA_ARCHES)\n}\nROCM_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    f\"rocm-{major}.{minor}\": dict(\n        name=f\"rocm-{major}.{minor}\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/rocm{major}.{minor}\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\"],\n        accelerator=\"rocm\",\n    )\n    for major, minor in (map(int, version.split(\".\")) for version in ROCM_ARCHES)\n}\nXPU_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    \"xpu\": dict(\n        name=\"xpu\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/xpu\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\"],\n        accelerator=\"xpu\",\n    )\n}\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(CUDA_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(ROCM_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(XPU_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\n\n\ndef get_nccl_wheel_version(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    requirements = map(\n        str.strip, re.split(\"[;|]\", PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[arch_version])\n    )\n    return next(x for x in requirements if x.startswith(\"nvidia-nccl\")).split(\"==\")[1]\n\n\ndef read_nccl_pin(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    nccl_pin_path = (\n        REPO_ROOT\n        / \".ci\"\n        / \"docker\"\n        / \"ci_commit_pins\"\n        / f\"nccl-cu{arch_version[:2]}.txt\"\n    )\n    return nccl_pin_path.read_text().strip()\n\n\ndef validate_nccl_dep_consistency(arch_version: str) -> None:\n    nccl_release_tag = read_nccl_pin(arch_version)\n    wheel_ver = get_nccl_wheel_version(arch_version)\n    if not nccl_release_tag.startswith(f\"v{wheel_ver}\"):\n        raise RuntimeError(\n            f\"{arch_version} NCCL release tag version {nccl_release_tag} \"\n            f\"does not correspond to wheel version {wheel_ver}\"\n        )\n\n\ndef arch_type(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    if arch_version in CUDA_ARCHES:\n        return \"cuda\"\n    elif arch_version in ROCM_ARCHES:\n        return \"rocm\"\n    elif arch_version in XPU_ARCHES:\n        return \"xpu\"\n    elif arch_version in CPU_AARCH64_ARCH:\n        return \"cpu-aarch64\"\n    elif arch_version in CPU_S390X_ARCH:\n        return \"cpu-s390x\"\n    elif arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES:\n        return \"cuda-aarch64\"\n    else:  # arch_version should always be \"cpu\" in this case\n        return \"cpu\"\n\n\nDEFAULT_TAG = os.getenv(\"RELEASE_VERSION_TAG\", \"main\")\n\nWHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES = {\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"manylinux2_28-builder:cuda{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in CUDA_ARCHES},\n    **{\n        gpu_arch: f\"manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda{gpu_arch.replace('-aarch64', '')}\"\n        for gpu_arch in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n    },\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"manylinux2_28-builder:rocm{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in ROCM_ARCHES},\n    \"xpu\": \"manylinux2_28-builder:xpu\",\n    \"cpu\": \"manylinux2_28-builder:cpu\",\n    \"cpu-aarch64\": \"manylinux2_28_aarch64-builder:cpu-aarch64\",\n    \"cpu-s390x\": \"pytorch/manylinuxs390x-builder:cpu-s390x\",\n}\n\nRELEASE = \"release\"\nDEBUG = \"debug\"\n\nLIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES: dict[str, str] = {\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"libtorch-cxx11-builder:cuda{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in CUDA_ARCHES},\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"libtorch-cxx11-builder:rocm{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in ROCM_ARCHES},\n    \"cpu\": \"libtorch-cxx11-builder:cpu\",\n}\n\nFULL_PYTHON_VERSIONS = [\"3.10\", \"3.11\", \"3.12\", \"3.13\", \"3.13t\", \"3.14\", \"3.14t\"]\n\n\ndef translate_desired_cuda(gpu_arch_type: str, gpu_arch_version: str) -> str:\n    return {\n        \"cpu\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cpu-aarch64\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cpu-s390x\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cuda\": f\"cu{gpu_arch_version.replace('.', '')}\",\n        \"cuda-aarch64\": f\"cu{gpu_arch_version.replace('-aarch64', '').replace('.', '')}\",\n        \"rocm\": f\"rocm{gpu_arch_version}\",\n        \"xpu\": \"xpu\",\n    }.get(gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version)\n\n\ndef list_without(in_list: list[str], without: list[str]) -> list[str]:\n    return [item for item in in_list if item not in without]\n\n\ndef generate_libtorch_matrix(\n    os: str,\n    release_type: str,\n    arches: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    libtorch_variants: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n    if arches is None:\n        arches = [\"cpu\"]\n        if os == \"linux\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES\n            arches += ROCM_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"windows\":\n            # TODO (huydhn): Only build CUDA 12.9 for Linux. This logic is to be cleaned up\n            # in 2.10\n            windows_cuda_arches = CUDA_ARCHES.copy()\n            windows_cuda_arches.remove(\"12.9\")\n            arches += windows_cuda_arches\n    if libtorch_variants is None:\n        libtorch_variants = [\n            \"shared-with-deps\",\n            \"shared-without-deps\",\n            \"static-with-deps\",\n            \"static-without-deps\",\n        ]\n\n    ret: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n    for arch_version in arches:\n        for libtorch_variant in libtorch_variants:\n            gpu_arch_type = arch_type(arch_version)\n            gpu_arch_version = \"\" if arch_version == \"cpu\" else arch_version\n            # ROCm builds without-deps failed even in ROCm runners; skip for now\n            if gpu_arch_type == \"rocm\" and (\"without-deps\" in libtorch_variant):\n                continue\n            ret.append(\n                {\n                    \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                    \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                    \"desired_cuda\": translate_desired_cuda(\n                        gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version\n                    ),\n                    \"libtorch_config\": release_type,\n                    \"libtorch_variant\": libtorch_variant,\n                    \"container_image\": (\n                        LIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\":\")[0]\n                        if os not in (\"windows\", \"windows-arm64\")\n                        else \"\"\n                    ),\n                    \"container_image_tag_prefix\": (\n                        LIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\":\")[1]\n                        if os not in (\"windows\", \"windows-arm64\")\n                        else \"\"\n                    ),\n                    \"package_type\": \"libtorch\",\n                    \"build_name\": f\"libtorch-{gpu_arch_type}{gpu_arch_version}-{libtorch_variant}-{release_type}\".replace(\n                        \".\", \"_\"\n                    ),\n                }\n            )\n    return ret\n\n\ndef generate_wheels_matrix(\n    os: str,\n    arches: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    python_versions: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n    package_type = \"wheel\"\n    if os == \"linux\" or os == \"linux-aarch64\" or os == \"linux-s390x\":\n        # NOTE: We only build manywheel packages for x86_64 and aarch64 and s390x linux\n        package_type = \"manywheel\"\n\n    if python_versions is None:\n        python_versions = FULL_PYTHON_VERSIONS\n\n    if arches is None:\n        # Define default compute archivectures\n        arches = [\"cpu\"]\n        if os == \"linux\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES + ROCM_ARCHES + XPU_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"windows\":\n            # TODO (huydhn): Only build CUDA 12.9 for Linux. This logic is to be cleaned up\n            # in 2.10\n            windows_cuda_arches = CUDA_ARCHES.copy()\n            windows_cuda_arches.remove(\"12.9\")\n            arches += windows_cuda_arches + XPU_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"linux-aarch64\":\n            # Separate new if as the CPU type is different and\n            # uses different build/test scripts\n            arches = CPU_AARCH64_ARCH + CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"linux-s390x\":\n            # Only want the one arch as the CPU type is different and\n            # uses different build/test scripts\n            arches = [\"cpu-s390x\"]\n\n    ret: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n    for python_version in python_versions:\n        for arch_version in arches:\n            gpu_arch_type = arch_type(arch_version)\n            gpu_arch_version = (\n                \"\"\n                if arch_version == \"cpu\"\n                or arch_version == \"cpu-aarch64\"\n                or arch_version == \"cpu-s390x\"\n                or arch_version == \"xpu\"\n                else arch_version\n            )\n\n            # TODO: Enable python 3.14 for rest\n            if os not in [\n                \"linux\",\n                \"linux-aarch64\",\n                \"linux-s390x\",\n                \"macos-arm64\",\n                \"windows\",\n            ] and (python_version == \"3.14\" or python_version == \"3.14t\"):\n                continue\n\n            # cuda linux wheels require PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS to install\n\n            if (\n                arch_version in [\"13.0\", \"12.9\", \"12.8\", \"12.6\"]\n                and os == \"linux\"\n                or arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n            ):\n                desired_cuda = translate_desired_cuda(gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version)\n                ret.append(\n                    {\n                        \"python_version\": python_version,\n                        \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                        \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                        \"desired_cuda\": desired_cuda,\n                        \"container_image\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\n                            \":\"\n                        )[0],\n                        \"container_image_tag_prefix\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[\n                            arch_version\n                        ].split(\":\")[1],\n                        \"package_type\": package_type,\n                        \"pytorch_extra_install_requirements\": (\n                            PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[\n                                f\"{desired_cuda[2:4]}.{desired_cuda[4:]}\"  # for cuda-aarch64: cu126 -> 12.6\n                            ]\n                            if os == \"linux-aarch64\"\n                            else PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[arch_version]\n                        ),\n                        \"build_name\": (\n                            f\"{package_type}-py{python_version}-{gpu_arch_type}\"\n                            f\"{'-' if 'aarch64' in gpu_arch_type else ''}{gpu_arch_version.replace('-aarch64', '')}\".replace(\n                                \".\", \"_\"\n                            )\n                        ),  # include special case for aarch64 build, remove the -aarch64 postfix\n                    }\n                )\n            else:\n                ret.append(\n                    {\n                        \"python_version\": python_version,\n                        \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                        \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                        \"desired_cuda\": translate_desired_cuda(\n                            gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version\n                        ),\n                        \"container_image\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\n                            \":\"\n                        )[0],\n                        \"container_image_tag_prefix\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[\n                            arch_version\n                        ].split(\":\")[1],\n                        \"package_type\": package_type,\n                        \"build_name\": f\"{package_type}-py{python_version}-{gpu_arch_type}{gpu_arch_version}\".replace(\n                            \".\", \"_\"\n                        ),\n                        \"pytorch_extra_install_requirements\": (\n                            PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[\"xpu\"]\n                            if gpu_arch_type == \"xpu\"\n                            else \"\"\n                        ),\n                    }\n                )\n\n    return ret\n\n\narch_version = \"\"\nfor arch_version in CUDA_ARCHES:\n    validate_nccl_dep_consistency(arch_version)\ndel arch_version\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    # Used by tools/nightly.py\n    (SCRIPT_DIR / \"nightly_source_matrix.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX, indent=4) + \"\\n\"\n    )\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "             arches += CUDA_ARCHES",
        "             arches += ROCM_ARCHES",

This logic is to be cleaned up\n            # in 2.10\n            windows_cuda_arches = CUDA_ARCHES.copy()\n            windows_cuda_arches.remove(\"12.9\")\n            arches += windows_cuda_arches + XPU_ARCHES",
  "originalFile": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\n\"\"\"Generates a matrix to be utilized through github actions\n\nWill output a condensed version of the matrix if on a pull request that only\nincludes the latest version of python we support built on three different\narchitectures:\n    * CPU\n    * Latest CUDA\n    * Latest ROCM\n    * Latest XPU\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport re\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional\n\n\nSCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).absolute().parent\nREPO_ROOT = SCRIPT_DIR.parent.parent\n\n\nCUDA_ARCHES = [\"12.6\", \"12.8\", \"13.0\"]\nCUDA_STABLE = \"12.8\"\nCUDA_ARCHES_FULL_VERSION = {\n    \"12.6\": \"12.6.3\",\n    \"12.8\": \"12.8.1\",\n    \"13.0\": \"13.0.0\",\n}\nCUDA_ARCHES_CUDNN_VERSION = {\n    \"12.6\": \"9\",\n    \"12.8\": \"9\",\n    \"13.0\": \"9\",\n}\n\nROCM_ARCHES = [\"7.0\", \"7.1\"]\n\nXPU_ARCHES = [\"xpu\"]\n\nCPU_AARCH64_ARCH = [\"cpu-aarch64\"]\n\nCPU_S390X_ARCH = [\"cpu-s390x\"]\n\nCUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES = [\"12.6-aarch64\", \"12.8-aarch64\", \"13.0-aarch64\"]\n\n\nPYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS = {\n    \"12.6\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==12.9.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.6.80; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu12==9.10.2.21; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas-cu12==12.6.4.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufft-cu12==11.3.0.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-curand-cu12==10.3.7.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusolver-cu12==11.7.1.2; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparse-cu12==12.5.4.2; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cusparselt-cu12==0.7.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.27.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink-cu12==12.6.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile-cu12==1.11.1.6; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"12.8\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==12.9.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu12==9.10.2.21; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas-cu12==12.8.4.1; platform_system == == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.27.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink-cu12==12.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile-cu12==1.13.1.3; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"13.0\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==13.0.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc==13.0.88; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime==13.0.96; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti==13.0.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu13==9.13.0.50; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas==13.1.0.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufft==12.0.0.61; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-curand==10.4.0.35; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu13==2.28.9; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu13==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx==13.0.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink==13.0.88; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile==1.15.1.6; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"xpu\": (\n        \"intel-cmplr-lib-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-cmplr-lib-ur==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-cmplr-lic-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-sycl-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"oneccl-devel==2021.17.1; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"oneccl==2021.17.1; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"impi-rt==2021.17.0; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"onemkl-license==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-blas==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-dft==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-lapack==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-rng==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-sparse==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"dpcpp-cpp-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-opencl-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"mkl==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"intel-openmp==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"tbb==2022.3.0 | \"\n        \"tcmlib==1.4.1 | \"\n        \"umf==1.0.2 | \"\n        \"intel-pti==0.15.0\"\n    ),\n}\n\n\n# Used by tools/nightly.py\nPYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL = \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly\"\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    \"cpu\": dict(\n        name=\"cpu\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/cpu\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\", \"macOS\", \"Windows\"],\n        accelerator=\"cpu\",\n    )\n}\nCUDA_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    f\"cuda-{major}.{minor}\": dict(\n        name=f\"cuda-{major}.{minor}\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/cu{major}{minor}\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\", \"Windows\"],\n        accelerator=\"cuda\",\n    )\n    for major, minor in (map(int, version.split(\".\")) for version in CUDA_ARCHES)\n}\nROCM_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    f\"rocm-{major}.{minor}\": dict(\n        name=f\"rocm-{major}.{minor}\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/rocm{major}.{minor}\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\"],\n        accelerator=\"rocm\",\n    )\n    for major, minor in (map(int, version.split(\".\")) for version in ROCM_ARCHES)\n}\nXPU_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    \"xpu\": dict(\n        name=\"xpu\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/xpu\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\"],\n        accelerator=\"xpu\",\n    )\n}\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(CUDA_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(ROCM_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(XPU_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\n\n\ndef get_nccl_wheel_version(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    requirements = map(\n        str.strip, re.split(\"[;|]\", PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[arch_version])\n    )\n    return next(x for x in requirements if x.startswith(\"nvidia-nccl\")).split(\"==\")[1]\n\n\ndef read_nccl_pin(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    nccl_pin_path = (\n        REPO_ROOT\n        / \".ci\"\n        / \"docker\"\n        / \"ci_commit_pins\"\n        / f\"nccl-cu{arch_version[:2]}.txt\"\n    )\n    return nccl_pin_path.read_text().strip()\n\n\ndef validate_nccl_dep_consistency(arch_version: str) -> None:\n    nccl_release_tag = read_nccl_pin(arch_version)\n    wheel_ver = get_nccl_wheel_version(arch_version)\n    if not nccl_release_tag.startswith(f\"v{wheel_ver}\"):\n        raise RuntimeError(\n            f\"{arch_version} NCCL release tag version {nccl_release_tag} \"\n            f\"does not correspond to wheel version {wheel_ver}\"\n        )\n\n\ndef arch_type(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    if arch_version in CUDA_ARCHES:\n        return \"cuda\"\n    elif arch_version in ROCM_ARCHES:\n        return \"rocm\"\n    elif arch_version in XPU_ARCHES:\n        return \"xpu\"\n    elif arch_version in CPU_AARCH64_ARCH:\n        return \"cpu-aarch64\"\n    elif arch_version in CPU_S390X_ARCH:\n        return \"cpu-s390x\"\n    elif arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES:\n        return \"cuda-aarch64\"\n    else:  # arch_version should always be \"cpu\" in this case\n        return \"cpu\"\n\n\nDEFAULT_TAG = os.getenv(\"RELEASE_VERSION_TAG\", \"main\")\n\nWHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES = {\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"manylinux2_28-builder:cuda{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in CUDA_ARCHES},\n    **{\n        gpu_arch: f\"manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda{gpu_arch.replace('-aarch64', '')}\"\n        for gpu_arch in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n    },\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"manylinux2_28-builder:rocm{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in ROCM_ARCHES},\n    \"xpu\": \"manylinux2_28-builder:xpu\",\n    \"cpu\": \"manylinux2_28-builder:cpu\",\n    \"cpu-aarch64\": \"manylinux2_28_aarch64-builder:cpu-aarch64\",\n    \"cpu-s390x\": \"pytorch/manylinuxs390x-builder:cpu-s390x\",\n}\n\nRELEASE = \"release\"\nDEBUG = \"debug\"\n\nLIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES: dict[str, str] = {\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"libtorch-cxx11-builder:cuda{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in CUDA_ARCHES},\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"libtorch-cxx11-builder:rocm{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in ROCM_ARCHES},\n    \"cpu\": \"libtorch-cxx11-builder:cpu\",\n}\n\nFULL_PYTHON_VERSIONS = [\"3.10\", \"3.11\", \"3.12\", \"3.13\", \"3.13t\", \"3.14\", \"3.14t\"]\n\n\ndef translate_desired_cuda(gpu_arch_type: str, gpu_arch_version: str) -> str:\n    return {\n        \"cpu\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cpu-aarch64\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cpu-s390x\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cuda\": f\"cu{gpu_arch_version.replace('.', '')}\",\n        \"cuda-aarch64\": f\"cu{gpu_arch_version.replace('-aarch64', '').replace('.', '')}\",\n        \"rocm\": f\"rocm{gpu_arch_version}\",\n        \"xpu\": \"xpu\",\n    }.get(gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version)\n\n\ndef list_without(in_list: list[str], without: list[str]) -> list[str]:\n    return [item for item in in_list if item not in without]\n\n\ndef generate_libtorch_matrix(\n    os: str,\n    release_type: str,\n    arches: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    libtorch_variants: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n    if arches is None:\n        arches = [\"cpu\"]\n        if os == \"linux\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES\n            arches += ROCM_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"windows\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES\n    if libtorch_variants is None:\n        libtorch_variants = [\n            \"shared-with-deps\",\n            \"shared-without-deps\",\n            \"static-with-deps\",\n            \"static-without-deps\",\n        ]\n\n    ret: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n    for arch_version in arches:\n        for libtorch_variant in libtorch_variants:\n            gpu_arch_type = arch_type(arch_version)\n            gpu_arch_version = \"\" if arch_version == \"cpu\" else arch_version\n            # ROCm builds without-deps failed even in ROCm runners; skip for now\n            if gpu_arch_type == \"rocm\" and (\"without-deps\" in libtorch_variant):\n                continue\n            ret.append(\n                {\n                    \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                    \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                    \"desired_cuda\": translate_desired_cuda(\n                        gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version\n                    ),\n                    \"libtorch_config\": release_type,\n                    \"libtorch_variant\": libtorch_variant,\n                    \"container_image\": (\n                        LIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\":\")[0]\n                        if os not in (\"windows\", \"windows-arm64\")\n                        else \"\"\n                    ),\n                    \"container_image_tag_prefix\": (\n                        LIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\":\")[1]\n                        if os not in (\"windows\", \"windows-arm64\")\n                        else \"\"\n                    ),\n                    \"package_type\": \"libtorch\",\n                    \"build_name\": f\"libtorch-{gpu_arch_type}{gpu_arch_version}-{libtorch_variant}-{release_type}\".replace(\n                        \".\", \"_\"\n                    ),\n                }\n            )\n    return ret\n\n\ndef generate_wheels_matrix(\n    os: str,\n    arches: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    python_versions: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n    package_type = \"wheel\"\n    if os == \"linux\" or os == \"linux-aarch64\" or os == \"linux-s390x\":\n        # NOTE: We only build manywheel packages for x86_64 and aarch64 and s390x linux\n        package_type = \"manywheel\"\n\n    if python_versions is None:\n        python_versions = FULL_PYTHON_VERSIONS\n\n    if arches is None:\n        # Define default compute archivectures\n        arches = [\"cpu\"]\n        if os == \"linux\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES + ROCM_ARCHES + XPU_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"windows\":\n            # TODO (huydhn): Only build CUDA 12.9 for Linux. This logic is to be cleaned up\n            # in 2.10\n            windows_cuda_arches = CUDA_ARCHES.copy()\n            windows_cuda_arches.remove(\"12.9\")\n            arches += windows_cuda_arches + XPU_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"linux-aarch64\":\n            # Separate new if as the CPU type is different and\n            # uses different build/test scripts\n            arches = CPU_AARCH64_ARCH + CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"linux-s390x\":\n            # Only want the one arch as the CPU type is different and\n            # uses different build/test scripts\n            arches = [\"cpu-s390x\"]\n\n    ret: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n    for python_version in python_versions:\n        for arch_version in arches:\n            gpu_arch_type = arch_type(arch_version)\n            gpu_arch_version = (\n                \"\"\n                if arch_version == \"cpu\"\n                or arch_version == \"cpu-aarch64\"\n                or arch_version == \"cpu-s390x\"\n                or arch_version == \"xpu\"\n                else arch_version\n            )\n\n            # TODO: Enable python 3.14 for rest\n            if os not in [\n                \"linux\",\n                \"linux-aarch64\",\n                \"linux-s390x\",\n                \"macos-arm64\",\n                \"windows\",\n            ] and (python_version == \"3.14\" or python_version == \"3.14t\"):\n                continue\n\n            # cuda linux wheels require PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS to install\n\n            if (\n                arch_version in [\"13.0\", \"12.9\", \"12.8\", \"12.6\"]\n                and os == \"linux\"\n                or arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n            ):\n                desired_cuda = translate_desired_cuda(gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version)\n                ret.append(\n                    {\n                        \"python_version\": python_version,\n                        \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                        \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                        \"desired_cuda\": desired_cuda,\n                        \"container_image\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\n                            \":\"\n                        )[0],\n                        \"container_image_tag_prefix\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[\n                            arch_version\n                        ].split(\":\")[1],\n                        \"package_type\": package_type,\n                        \"pytorch_extra_install_requirements\": (\n                            PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[\n                                f\"{desired_cuda[2:4]}.{desired_cuda[4:]}\"  # for cuda-aarch64: cu126 -> 12.6\n                            ]\n                            if os == \"linux-aarch64\"\n                            else PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[arch_version]\n                        ),\n                        \"build_name\": (\n                            f\"{package_type}-py{python_version}-{gpu_arch_type}\"\n                            f\"{'-' if 'aarch64' in gpu_arch_type else ''}{gpu_arch_version.replace('-aarch64', '')}\".replace(\n                                \".\", \"_\"\n                            )\n                        ),  # include special case for aarch64 build, remove the -aarch64 postfix\n                    }\n                )\n            else:\n                ret.append(\n                    {\n                        \"python_version\": python_version,\n                        \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                        \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                        \"desired_cuda\": translate_desired_cuda(\n                            gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version\n                        ),\n                        \"container_image\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\n                            \":\"\n                        )[0],\n                        \"container_image_tag_prefix\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[\n                            arch_version\n                        ].split(\":\")[1],\n                        \"package_type\": package_type,\n                        \"build_name\": f\"{package_type}-py{python_version}-{gpu_arch_type}{gpu_arch_version}\".replace(\n                            \".\", \"_\"\n                        ),\n                        \"pytorch_extra_install_requirements\": (\n                            PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[\"xpu\"]\n                            if gpu_arch_type == \"xpu\"\n                            else \"\"\n                        ),\n                    }\n                )\n\n    return ret\n\n\narch_version = \"\"\nfor arch_version in CUDA_ARCHES:\n    validate_nccl_dep_consistency(arch_version)\ndel arch_version\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    # Used by tools/nightly.py\n    (SCRIPT_DIR / \"nightly_source_matrix.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX, indent=4) + \"\\n\"\n    )\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "         if os == \"linux\":",
        "             arches += CUDA_ARCHES + ROCM_ARCHES + XPU_ARCHES",
        "         elif os == \"windows\":",
        "-            # TODO (huydhn): Only build CUDA 12.9 for Linux. This logic is to be cleaned up",
        "-            # in 2.10",
        "-            windows_cuda_arches = CUDA_ARCHES.copy()",
        "-            windows_cuda_arches.remove(\"12.9\")",
        "-            arches += windows_cuda_arches + XPU_ARCHES",
        "+            arches += CUDA_ARCHES + XPU_ARCHES",

  "originalFile": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\n\"\"\"Generates a matrix to be utilized through github actions\n\nWill output a condensed version of the matrix if on a pull request that only\nincludes the latest version of python we support built on three different\narchitectures:\n    * CPU\n    * Latest CUDA\n    * Latest ROCM\n    * Latest XPU\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport re\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional\n\n\nSCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).absolute().parent\nREPO_ROOT = SCRIPT_DIR.parent.parent\n\n\nCUDA_ARCHES = [\"12.6\", \"12.8\", \"13.0\"]\nCUDA_STABLE = \"12.8\"\nCUDA_ARCHES_FULL_VERSION = {\n    \"12.6\": \"12.6.3\",\n    \"12.8\": \"12.8.1\",\n    \"13.0\": \"13.0.0\",\n}\nCUDA_ARCHES_CUDNN_VERSION = {\n    \"12.6\": \"9\",\n    \"12.8\": \"9\",\n    \"13.0\": \"9\",\n}\n\nROCM_ARCHES = [\"7.0\", \"7.1\"]\n\nXPU_ARCHES = [\"xpu\"]\n\nCPU_AARCH64_ARCH = [\"cpu-aarch64\"]\n\nCPU_S390X_ARCH = [\"cpu-s390x\"]\n\nCUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES = [\"12.6-aarch64\", \"12.8-aarch64\", \"13.0-aarch64\"]\n\n\nPYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS = {\n    \"12.6\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==12.9.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.6.80; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.6.77; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu12==9.10.2.21; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas-cu12==12.8.4.1; platform_system == == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.27.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.8.90; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink-cu12==12.8.93; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile-cu12==1.13.1.3; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"13.0\": (\n        \"cuda-bindings==13.0.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-nvrtc==13.0.88; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-runtime==13.0.96; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cuda-cupti==13.0.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cudnn-cu13==9.13.0.50; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cublas==13.1.0.3; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufft==12.0.0.61; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-curand==10.4.0.35; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n | \"\n        \"nvidia-nccl-cu13==2.28.9; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvshmem-cu13==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvtx==13.0.85; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-nvjitlink==13.0.88; platform_system == 'Linux' | \"\n        \"nvidia-cufile==1.15.1.6; platform_system == 'Linux'\"\n    ),\n    \"xpu\": (\n        \"intel-cmplr-lib-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-cmplr-lib-ur==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-cmplr-lic-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-sycl-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"oneccl-devel==2021.17.1; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"oneccl==2021.17.1; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"impi-rt==2021.17.0; platform_system == 'Linux' and platform_machine == 'x86_64' | \"\n        \"onemkl-license==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-blas==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-dft==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-lapack==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-rng==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"onemkl-sycl-sparse==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"dpcpp-cpp-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"intel-opencl-rt==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"mkl==2025.3.0 | \"\n        \"intel-openmp==2025.3.1 | \"\n        \"tbb==2022.3.0 | \"\n        \"tcmlib==1.4.1 | \"\n        \"umf==1.0.2 | \"\n        \"intel-pti==0.15.0\"\n    ),\n}\n\n\n# Used by tools/nightly.py\nPYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL = \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly\"\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    \"cpu\": dict(\n        name=\"cpu\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/cpu\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\", \"macOS\", \"Windows\"],\n        accelerator=\"cpu\",\n    )\n}\nCUDA_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    f\"cuda-{major}.{minor}\": dict(\n        name=f\"cuda-{major}.{minor}\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/cu{major}{minor}\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\", \"Windows\"],\n        accelerator=\"cuda\",\n    )\n    for major, minor in (map(int, version.split(\".\")) for version in CUDA_ARCHES)\n}\nROCM_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    f\"rocm-{major}.{minor}\": dict(\n        name=f\"rocm-{major}.{minor}\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/rocm{major}.{minor}\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\"],\n        accelerator=\"rocm\",\n    )\n    for major, minor in (map(int, version.split(\".\")) for version in ROCM_ARCHES)\n}\nXPU_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX = {\n    \"xpu\": dict(\n        name=\"xpu\",\n        index_url=f\"{PYTORCH_NIGHTLY_PIP_INDEX_URL}/xpu\",\n        supported_platforms=[\"Linux\"],\n        accelerator=\"xpu\",\n    )\n}\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(CUDA_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(ROCM_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\nNIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX.update(XPU_NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX)\n\n\ndef get_nccl_wheel_version(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    requirements = map(\n        str.strip, re.split(\"[;|]\", PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[arch_version])\n    )\n    return next(x for x in requirements if x.startswith(\"nvidia-nccl\")).split(\"==\")[1]\n\n\ndef read_nccl_pin(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    nccl_pin_path = (\n        REPO_ROOT\n        / \".ci\"\n        / \"docker\"\n        / \"ci_commit_pins\"\n        / f\"nccl-cu{arch_version[:2]}.txt\"\n    )\n    return nccl_pin_path.read_text().strip()\n\n\ndef validate_nccl_dep_consistency(arch_version: str) -> None:\n    nccl_release_tag = read_nccl_pin(arch_version)\n    wheel_ver = get_nccl_wheel_version(arch_version)\n    if not nccl_release_tag.startswith(f\"v{wheel_ver}\"):\n        raise RuntimeError(\n            f\"{arch_version} NCCL release tag version {nccl_release_tag} \"\n            f\"does not correspond to wheel version {wheel_ver}\"\n        )\n\n\ndef arch_type(arch_version: str) -> str:\n    if arch_version in CUDA_ARCHES:\n        return \"cuda\"\n    elif arch_version in ROCM_ARCHES:\n        return \"rocm\"\n    elif arch_version in XPU_ARCHES:\n        return \"xpu\"\n    elif arch_version in CPU_AARCH64_ARCH:\n        return \"cpu-aarch64\"\n    elif arch_version in CPU_S390X_ARCH:\n        return \"cpu-s390x\"\n    elif arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES:\n        return \"cuda-aarch64\"\n    else:  # arch_version should always be \"cpu\" in this case\n        return \"cpu\"\n\n\nDEFAULT_TAG = os.getenv(\"RELEASE_VERSION_TAG\", \"main\")\n\nWHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES = {\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"manylinux2_28-builder:cuda{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in CUDA_ARCHES},\n    **{\n        gpu_arch: f\"manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda{gpu_arch.replace('-aarch64', '')}\"\n        for gpu_arch in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n    },\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"manylinux2_28-builder:rocm{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in ROCM_ARCHES},\n    \"xpu\": \"manylinux2_28-builder:xpu\",\n    \"cpu\": \"manylinux2_28-builder:cpu\",\n    \"cpu-aarch64\": \"manylinux2_28_aarch64-builder:cpu-aarch64\",\n    \"cpu-s390x\": \"pytorch/manylinuxs390x-builder:cpu-s390x\",\n}\n\nRELEASE = \"release\"\nDEBUG = \"debug\"\n\nLIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES: dict[str, str] = {\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"libtorch-cxx11-builder:cuda{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in CUDA_ARCHES},\n    **{gpu_arch: f\"libtorch-cxx11-builder:rocm{gpu_arch}\" for gpu_arch in ROCM_ARCHES},\n    \"cpu\": \"libtorch-cxx11-builder:cpu\",\n}\n\nFULL_PYTHON_VERSIONS = [\"3.10\", \"3.11\", \"3.12\", \"3.13\", \"3.13t\", \"3.14\", \"3.14t\"]\n\n\ndef translate_desired_cuda(gpu_arch_type: str, gpu_arch_version: str) -> str:\n    return {\n        \"cpu\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cpu-aarch64\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cpu-s390x\": \"cpu\",\n        \"cuda\": f\"cu{gpu_arch_version.replace('.', '')}\",\n        \"cuda-aarch64\": f\"cu{gpu_arch_version.replace('-aarch64', '').replace('.', '')}\",\n        \"rocm\": f\"rocm{gpu_arch_version}\",\n        \"xpu\": \"xpu\",\n    }.get(gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version)\n\n\ndef list_without(in_list: list[str], without: list[str]) -> list[str]:\n    return [item for item in in_list if item not in without]\n\n\ndef generate_libtorch_matrix(\n    os: str,\n    release_type: str,\n    arches: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    libtorch_variants: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n    if arches is None:\n        arches = [\"cpu\"]\n        if os == \"linux\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES\n            arches += ROCM_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"windows\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES\n    if libtorch_variants is None:\n        libtorch_variants = [\n            \"shared-with-deps\",\n            \"shared-without-deps\",\n            \"static-with-deps\",\n            \"static-without-deps\",\n        ]\n\n    ret: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n    for arch_version in arches:\n        for libtorch_variant in libtorch_variants:\n            gpu_arch_type = arch_type(arch_version)\n            gpu_arch_version = \"\" if arch_version == \"cpu\" else arch_version\n            # ROCm builds without-deps failed even in ROCm runners; skip for now\n            if gpu_arch_type == \"rocm\" and (\"without-deps\" in libtorch_variant):\n                continue\n            ret.append(\n                {\n                    \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                    \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                    \"desired_cuda\": translate_desired_cuda(\n                        gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version\n                    ),\n                    \"libtorch_config\": release_type,\n                    \"libtorch_variant\": libtorch_variant,\n                    \"container_image\": (\n                        LIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\":\")[0]\n                        if os not in (\"windows\", \"windows-arm64\")\n                        else \"\"\n                    ),\n                    \"container_image_tag_prefix\": (\n                        LIBTORCH_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\":\")[1]\n                        if os not in (\"windows\", \"windows-arm64\")\n                        else \"\"\n                    ),\n                    \"package_type\": \"libtorch\",\n                    \"build_name\": f\"libtorch-{gpu_arch_type}{gpu_arch_version}-{libtorch_variant}-{release_type}\".replace(\n                        \".\", \"_\"\n                    ),\n                }\n            )\n    return ret\n\n\ndef generate_wheels_matrix(\n    os: str,\n    arches: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n    python_versions: Optional[list[str]] = None,\n) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n    package_type = \"wheel\"\n    if os == \"linux\" or os == \"linux-aarch64\" or os == \"linux-s390x\":\n        # NOTE: We only build manywheel packages for x86_64 and aarch64 and s390x linux\n        package_type = \"manywheel\"\n\n    if python_versions is None:\n        python_versions = FULL_PYTHON_VERSIONS\n\n    if arches is None:\n        # Define default compute archivectures\n        arches = [\"cpu\"]\n        if os == \"linux\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES + ROCM_ARCHES + XPU_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"windows\":\n            arches += CUDA_ARCHES + XPU_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"linux-aarch64\":\n            # Separate new if as the CPU type is different and\n            # uses different build/test scripts\n            arches = CPU_AARCH64_ARCH + CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n        elif os == \"linux-s390x\":\n            # Only want the one arch as the CPU type is different and\n            # uses different build/test scripts\n            arches = [\"cpu-s390x\"]\n\n    ret: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n    for python_version in python_versions:\n        for arch_version in arches:\n            gpu_arch_type = arch_type(arch_version)\n            gpu_arch_version = (\n                \"\"\n                if arch_version == \"cpu\"\n                or arch_version == \"cpu-aarch64\"\n                or arch_version == \"cpu-s390x\"\n                or arch_version == \"xpu\"\n                else arch_version\n            )\n\n            # TODO: Enable python 3.14 for rest\n            if os not in [\n                \"linux\",\n                \"linux-aarch64\",\n                \"linux-s390x\",\n                \"macos-arm64\",\n                \"windows\",\n            ] and (python_version == \"3.14\" or python_version == \"3.14t\"):\n                continue\n\n            # cuda linux wheels require PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS to install\n\n            if (\n                arch_version in [\"13.0\", \"12.9\", \"12.8\", \"12.6\"]\n                and os == \"linux\"\n                or arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES\n            ):\n                desired_cuda = translate_desired_cuda(gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version)\n                ret.append(\n                    {\n                        \"python_version\": python_version,\n                        \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                        \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                        \"desired_cuda\": desired_cuda,\n                        \"container_image\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\n                            \":\"\n                        )[0],\n                        \"container_image_tag_prefix\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[\n                            arch_version\n                        ].split(\":\")[1],\n                        \"package_type\": package_type,\n                        \"pytorch_extra_install_requirements\": (\n                            PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[\n                                f\"{desired_cuda[2:4]}.{desired_cuda[4:]}\"  # for cuda-aarch64: cu126 -> 12.6\n                            ]\n                            if os == \"linux-aarch64\"\n                            else PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[arch_version]\n                        ),\n                        \"build_name\": (\n                            f\"{package_type}-py{python_version}-{gpu_arch_type}\"\n                            f\"{'-' if 'aarch64' in gpu_arch_type else ''}{gpu_arch_version.replace('-aarch64', '')}\".replace(\n                                \".\", \"_\"\n                            )\n                        ),  # include special case for aarch64 build, remove the -aarch64 postfix\n                    }\n                )\n            else:\n                ret.append(\n                    {\n                        \"python_version\": python_version,\n                        \"gpu_arch_type\": gpu_arch_type,\n                        \"gpu_arch_version\": gpu_arch_version,\n                        \"desired_cuda\": translate_desired_cuda(\n                            gpu_arch_type, gpu_arch_version\n                        ),\n                        \"container_image\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[arch_version].split(\n                            \":\"\n                        )[0],\n                        \"container_image_tag_prefix\": WHEEL_CONTAINER_IMAGES[\n                            arch_version\n                        ].split(\":\")[1],\n                        \"package_type\": package_type,\n                        \"build_name\": f\"{package_type}-py{python_version}-{gpu_arch_type}{gpu_arch_version}\".replace(\n                            \".\", \"_\"\n                        ),\n                        \"pytorch_extra_install_requirements\": (\n                            PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS[\"xpu\"]\n                            if gpu_arch_type == \"xpu\"\n                            else \"\"\n                        ),\n                    }\n                )\n\n    return ret\n\n\narch_version = \"\"\nfor arch_version in CUDA_ARCHES:\n    validate_nccl_dep_consistency(arch_version)\ndel arch_version\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    # Used by tools/nightly.py\n    (SCRIPT_DIR / \"nightly_source_matrix.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(NIGHTLY_SOURCE_MATRIX, indent=4) + \"\\n\"\n    )\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "             # cuda linux wheels require PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS to install",
        " ",
        "             if (",
        "-                arch_version in [\"13.0\", \"12.9\", \"12.8\", \"12.6\"]",
        "+                arch_version in [\"13.0\", \"12.8\", \"12.6\"]",
        "                 and os == \"linux\"",
        "                 or arch_version in CUDA_AARCH64_ARCHES",
        "             ):"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 368,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 368
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}
214. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-almalinux-images.yml"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "name: Build almalinux docker images\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate or nightly builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-almalinux-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-almalinux-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n\nenv:\n  DOCKER_REGISTRY: \"docker.io\"\n  DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1\n  WITH_PUSH: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  build-docker:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build') || '' }}\n    runs-on: linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\n    strategy:\n      matrix:\n        tag: [\"cuda12.6\", \"cuda12.8\", \"cuda12.9\", \"cuda13.0\", \"rocm7.0\", \"rocm7.1\", \"cpu\"]\n    steps:\n      - name: Build docker image\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/binary-docker-build@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image-name: almalinux-builder\n          custom-tag-prefix: ${{matrix.tag}}\n          docker-build-dir: almalinux\n          DOCKER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}\n          DOCKER_ID: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_ID }}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-almalinux-images.yml",
    "numLines": 49,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 49
  },
  "type": "text"
}
215. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "name: Build manywheel docker images\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate or nightly builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n\nenv:\n  DOCKER_REGISTRY: \"docker.io\"\n  DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1\n  WITH_PUSH: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  build:\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build') || '' }}\n    needs: get-label-type\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        include: [\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda13.0\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda12.8\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda12.9\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda12.6\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda13.0\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda12.9\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda12.8\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda12.6\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"rocm7.0\",           runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"rocm7.1\",           runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cpu\",               runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28_aarch64-builder\",  tag: \"cpu-aarch64\",       runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"xpu\",               runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n        ]\n    runs-on: ${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}${{ matrix.runner }}\n    name: ${{ matrix.name }}:${{ matrix.tag }}\n    steps:\n      - name: Build docker image\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/binary-docker-build@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image-name: ${{ matrix.name }}\n          custom-tag-prefix: ${{ matrix.tag }}\n          docker-build-dir: manywheel\n          DOCKER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}\n          DOCKER_ID: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_ID }}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml",
    "numLines": 74,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 74
  },
  "type": "text"
}

218. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml",
  "new_string": "          { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },",
  "old_string": "          { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.9\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml",
  "newString": "          { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },",
  "oldString": "          { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.9\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },",
  "originalFile": "name: Build libtorch docker images\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate or nightly builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n\nenv:\n  DOCKER_REGISTRY: \"docker.io\"\n  DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1\n  WITH_PUSH: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  build:\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build') || '' }}\n    needs: get-label-type\n    runs-on: ${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\n    name: libtorch-cxx11-builder:${{ matrix.tag }}\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        include: [\n          { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.9\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.6\" },\n          { tag: \"rocm7.0\"  },\n          { tag: \"rocm7.1\"  },\n          { tag: \"cpu\"      },\n        ]\n    steps:\n      - name: Build docker image\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/binary-docker-build@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image-name: libtorch-cxx11-builder\n          custom-tag-prefix: ${{ matrix.tag }}\n          docker-build-dir: libtorch\n          DOCKER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}\n          DOCKER_ID: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_ID }}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "       matrix:",
        "         include: [",
        "           { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },",
        "-          { tag: \"cuda12.9\" },",
        "           { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },",
        "           { tag: \"cuda12.6\" },",
        "           { tag: \"rocm7.0\"  },"
      ],
      "newLines": 6,
      "newStart": 49,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 49
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

{

  "limit": 80,
  "offset": 240
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "      DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_PREFIX: cuda12.8\n      DESIRED_PYTHON: \"3.10\"\n      build_name: manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_8\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-upload.yml\n\n  manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9-build:\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-build-linux.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\n      PACKAGE_TYPE: manywheel\n      # TODO: This is a legacy variable that we eventually want to get rid of in\n      #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\n      DESIRED_CUDA: cu129\n      GPU_ARCH_VERSION: \"12.9\"\n      GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cuda\n      DOCKER_IMAGE: manylinux2_28-builder\n      DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_PREFIX: cuda12.9\n      DESIRED_PYTHON: \"3.10\"\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build_name: manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9\n      build_environment: linux-binary-manywheel\n      PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: cuda-bindings==12.9.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cuda-nvrtc-cu12==12.9.86; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12==12.9.79; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cuda-cupti-cu12==12.9.79; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cudnn-cu12==9.10.2.21; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cublas-cu12==12.9.1.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cufft-cu12==11.4.1.4; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-curand-cu12==10.3.10.19; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cusolver-cu12==11.7.5.82; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cusparse-cu12==12.5.10.65; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cusparselt-cu12==0.7.1; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.27.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-nvshmem-cu12==3.4.5; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-nvtx-cu12==12.9.79; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-nvjitlink-cu12==12.9.86; platform_system == 'Linux' | nvidia-cufile-cu12==1.14.1.1; platform_system == 'Linux'\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n  manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9-test:  # Testing\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    needs:\n      - manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9-build\n      - get-label-type\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-test-linux.yml\n    with:\n      PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\n      PACKAGE_TYPE: manywheel\n      # TODO: This is a legacy variable that we eventually want to get rid of in\n      #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\n      DESIRED_CUDA: cu129\n      GPU_ARCH_VERSION: \"12.9\"\n      GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cuda\n      DOCKER_IMAGE: manylinux2_28-builder\n      DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_PREFIX: cuda12.9\n      DESIRED_PYTHON: \"3.10\"\n      build_name: manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9\n      build_environment: linux-binary-manywheel\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.g4dn.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu # 12.8+ builds need sm_70+ runner\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n  manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9-upload:  # Uploading\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    needs: manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9-test\n    with:\n      PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\n      PACKAGE_TYPE: manywheel\n      # TODO: This is a legacy variable that we eventually want to get rid of in\n      #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\n      DESIRED_CUDA: cu129\n      GPU_ARCH_VERSION: \"12.9\"\n      GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cuda\n      DOCKER_IMAGE: manylinux2_28-builder\n      DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_PREFIX: cuda12.9\n      DESIRED_PYTHON: \"3.10\"\n      build_name: manywheel-py3_10-cuda12_9\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-upload.yml\n\n  manywheel-py3_10-cuda13_0-build:\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-build-linux.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch",
    "filePath": "/workspace/.github/workflows/generated-linux-binary-manywheel-nightly.yml",

250. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "for f in /workspace/.github/workflows/generated-*.yml; do count=$(grep -c \"cuda12_9\\|12_9\" \"$f\" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ \"$count\" -gt 0 ]; then echo \"$f: $count\"; fi; done",
  "description": "Check all generated workflow files for CUDA 12.9 references"
}
