252. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "name: Build vLLM wheels\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/vllm.txt\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/vllm.txt\n  schedule:\n    # every morning at 01:30PM UTC, 9:30AM EST, 6:30AM PST\n    - cron: 30 13 * * *\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  build-wheel:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        python-version: [ '3.12' ]\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    name: \"Build ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    runs-on: ${{ matrix.runner }}\n    timeout-minutes: 480\n    env:\n      PY_VERS: ${{ matrix.python-version }}\n      MANYLINUX_IMAGE: ${{ matrix.manylinux-image }}\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup SSH (Click me for login details)\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n\n      - name: Setup Linux\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\n\n      - name: Get latest PyTorch nightly\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          # Determine python executable for given version (copied from build-triton-wheel)\n          case $PY_VERS in\n          3.10)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp310-cp310/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.11)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp311-cp311/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.12)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp312-cp312/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          *)\n            echo \"Unsupported python version ${PY_VERS}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n          esac\n\n          # Keep PyTorch nightly wheel here so that we can install it later during\n          # vLLM build process\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n          container_name=$(docker run \\\n            --tty \\\n            --detach \\\n            -e PLATFORM \\\n            -e PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=\"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" \\\n            -v \"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}:/pytorch\" \\\n            -v \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts:/artifacts\" \\\n            -w /artifacts/ \\\n            \"${MANYLINUX_IMAGE}\"\n          )\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip install \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          # I wonder if there is a command to both download and install the wheels\n          # in one go\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip download \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          # Save this for later\n          echo \"container_name=${container_name}\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Build vLLM wheel\n        uses: ./.github/actions/build-external-packages\n        with:\n          build-targets: vllm\n          docker-image: ${{ env.MANYLINUX_IMAGE }}\n          cuda-arch-list: '8.0;8.9;9.0;10.0;12.0'\n          torch-wheel-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n          output-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals\n\n      - name: Prepare vLLM wheel\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          # Get these wheels ready, the vllm renaming logic is copied from its .buildkite/scripts/upload-wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" bash -c /pytorch/.github/scripts/prepare_vllm_wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" chown -R 1000:1000 /artifacts\n\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: vllm-wheel-${{ matrix.device }}-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals/vllm/wheels/*.whl\n\n      - name: Teardown Linux\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\n        if: always()\n\n  # Copied from build-triton-wheel workflow (mostly)\n  upload-wheel:\n    name: \"Upload ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    needs:\n      - build-wheel\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    env:\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    container:\n      image: continuumio/miniconda3:4.12.0\n    environment: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch') && 'nightly-wheel-upload' || '' }}\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for main\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_nightly_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for RC builds\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' &&  (startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/') && !startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/')) }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_test_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Download Build Artifacts\n        uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          # Download all available artifacts\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts-all\n\n      - name: Select Wheel Artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          mv \"${RUNNER_TEMP}\"/artifacts-all/vllm-wheel-\"${BUILD_DEVICE}\"-\"${PLATFORM}\"-*/* \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n      - name: Set DRY_RUN\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v'))) || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          echo \"DRY_RUN=disabled\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Set UPLOAD_CHANNEL\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n\n          if [[ \"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\" = *-rc[0-9]* ]]; then\n            echo \"UPLOAD_CHANNEL=test\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n          fi\n\n      - name: Upload binaries\n        env:\n          PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\n          UPLOAD_SUBFOLDER: ${{ env.BUILD_DEVICE }}\n          PKG_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n          bash .circleci/scripts/binary_upload.sh\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml",
    "numLines": 250,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 250
  },
  "type": "text"
}
253. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml",
  "new_string": "        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130",
  "old_string": "        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml",
  "newString": "        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130",
  "oldString": "        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130",
  "originalFile": "name: Build vLLM wheels\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/vllm.txt\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/vllm.txt\n  schedule:\n    # every morning at 01:30PM UTC, 9:30AM EST, 6:30AM PST\n    - cron: 30 13 * * *\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  build-wheel:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        python-version: [ '3.12' ]\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    name: \"Build ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    runs-on: ${{ matrix.runner }}\n    timeout-minutes: 480\n    env:\n      PY_VERS: ${{ matrix.python-version }}\n      MANYLINUX_IMAGE: ${{ matrix.manylinux-image }}\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup SSH (Click me for login details)\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n\n      - name: Setup Linux\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\n\n      - name: Get latest PyTorch nightly\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          # Determine python executable for given version (copied from build-triton-wheel)\n          case $PY_VERS in\n          3.10)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp310-cp310/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.11)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp311-cp311/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.12)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp312-cp312/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          *)\n            echo \"Unsupported python version ${PY_VERS}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n          esac\n\n          # Keep PyTorch nightly wheel here so that we can install it later during\n          # vLLM build process\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n          container_name=$(docker run \\\n            --tty \\\n            --detach \\\n            -e PLATFORM \\\n            -e PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=\"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" \\\n            -v \"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}:/pytorch\" \\\n            -v \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts:/artifacts\" \\\n            -w /artifacts/ \\\n            \"${MANYLINUX_IMAGE}\"\n          )\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip install \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          # I wonder if there is a command to both download and install the wheels\n          # in one go\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip download \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          # Save this for later\n          echo \"container_name=${container_name}\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Build vLLM wheel\n        uses: ./.github/actions/build-external-packages\n        with:\n          build-targets: vllm\n          docker-image: ${{ env.MANYLINUX_IMAGE }}\n          cuda-arch-list: '8.0;8.9;9.0;10.0;12.0'\n          torch-wheel-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n          output-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals\n\n      - name: Prepare vLLM wheel\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          # Get these wheels ready, the vllm renaming logic is copied from its .buildkite/scripts/upload-wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" bash -c /pytorch/.github/scripts/prepare_vllm_wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" chown -R 1000:1000 /artifacts\n\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: vllm-wheel-${{ matrix.device }}-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals/vllm/wheels/*.whl\n\n      - name: Teardown Linux\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\n        if: always()\n\n  # Copied from build-triton-wheel workflow (mostly)\n  upload-wheel:\n    name: \"Upload ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    needs:\n      - build-wheel\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    env:\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    container:\n      image: continuumio/miniconda3:4.12.0\n    environment: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch') && 'nightly-wheel-upload' || '' }}\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for main\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_nightly_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for RC builds\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' &&  (startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/') && !startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/')) }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_test_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Download Build Artifacts\n        uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          # Download all available artifacts\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts-all\n\n      - name: Select Wheel Artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          mv \"${RUNNER_TEMP}\"/artifacts-all/vllm-wheel-\"${BUILD_DEVICE}\"-\"${PLATFORM}\"-*/* \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n      - name: Set DRY_RUN\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v'))) || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          echo \"DRY_RUN=disabled\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Set UPLOAD_CHANNEL\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n\n          if [[ \"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\" = *-rc[0-9]* ]]; then\n            echo \"UPLOAD_CHANNEL=test\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n          fi\n\n      - name: Upload binaries\n        env:\n          PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\n          UPLOAD_SUBFOLDER: ${{ env.BUILD_DEVICE }}\n          PKG_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n          bash .circleci/scripts/binary_upload.sh\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "       matrix:",
        "         python-version: [ '3.12' ]",
        "         platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]",
        "-        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]",
        "+        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu130' ]",
        "         include:",
        "           - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64",
        "             device: cu128",
        "             manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'",
        "             runner: linux.12xlarge.memory",
        "           - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64",
        "-            device: cu129",
        "-            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.9'",
        "-            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory",
        "-          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64",
        "             device: cu130",
        "             manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'",
        "             runner: linux.12xlarge.memory"
      ],
      "newLines": 13,
      "newStart": 28,
      "oldLines": 17,
      "oldStart": 28
    },
    {
      "lines": [
        "             device: cu128",
        "             manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'",
        "             runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory",
        "-          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64",
        "-            device: cu129",
        "-            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.9'",
        "-            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory",
        "         exclude:",
        "-          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and",
        "-          # xformers is update to support 13.0",
        "           - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64",

        "     name: \"Build ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\""

6:30AM PST\n    - cron: 30 13 * * *\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  build-wheel:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        python-version: [ '3.12' ]\n cu130\n    name: \"Build ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    runs-on: ${{ matrix.runner }}\n    timeout-minutes: 480\n    env:\n      PY_VERS: ${{ matrix.python-version }}\n      MANYLINUX_IMAGE: ${{ matrix.manylinux-image }}\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup SSH (Click me for login details)\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n\n      - name: Setup Linux\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\n\n      - name: Get latest PyTorch nightly\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          # Determine python executable for given version (copied from build-triton-wheel)\n          case $PY_VERS in\n          3.10)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp310-cp310/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.11)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp311-cp311/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.12)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp312-cp312/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313/bin/python\n ;;\n          3.14t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          *)\n            echo \"Unsupported python version ${PY_VERS}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n          esac\n\n          # Keep PyTorch nightly wheel here so that we can install it later during\n          # vLLM build process\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n          container_name=$(docker run \\\n            --tty \\\n            --detach \\\n            -e PLATFORM \\\n            -e PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=\"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" \\\n            -v \"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}:/pytorch\" \\\n            -v \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts:/artifacts\" \\\n            -w /artifacts/ \\\n            \"${MANYLINUX_IMAGE}\"\n          )\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip install \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          # I wonder if there is a command to both download and install the wheels\n          # in one go\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip download \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          # Save this for later\n          echo \"container_name=${container_name}\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Build vLLM wheel\n        uses: ./.github/actions/build-external-packages\n        with:\n          build-targets: vllm\n          docker-image: ${{ env.MANYLINUX_IMAGE }}\n          cuda-arch-list: '8.0;8.9;9.0;10.0;12.0'\n          torch-wheel-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n          output-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals\n\n      - name: Prepare vLLM wheel\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          # Get these wheels ready, the vllm renaming logic is copied from its .buildkite/scripts/upload-wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" bash -c /pytorch/.github/scripts/prepare_vllm_wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" chown -R 1000:1000 /artifacts\n\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: vllm-wheel-${{ matrix.device }}-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals/vllm/wheels/*.whl\n\n      - name: Teardown Linux\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\n        if: always()\n\n  # Copied from build-triton-wheel workflow (mostly)\n  upload-wheel:\n    name: \"Upload ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    needs:\n      - build-wheel\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        exclude:\n          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and\n          # xformers is update to support 13.0\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    env:\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    container:\n      image: continuumio/miniconda3:4.12.0\n    environment: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch') && 'nightly-wheel-upload' || '' }}\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for main\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_nightly_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for RC builds\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' &&  (startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/') && !startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/')) }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_test_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Download Build Artifacts\n        uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          # Download all available artifacts\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts-all\n\n      - name: Select Wheel Artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          mv \"${RUNNER_TEMP}\"/artifacts-all/vllm-wheel-\"${BUILD_DEVICE}\"-\"${PLATFORM}\"-*/* \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n      - name: Set DRY_RUN\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v'))) || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          echo \"DRY_RUN=disabled\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Set UPLOAD_CHANNEL\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n\n          if [[ \"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\" = *-rc[0-9]* ]]; then\n            echo \"UPLOAD_CHANNEL=test\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n          fi\n\n      - name: Upload binaries\n        env:\n          PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\n          UPLOAD_SUBFOLDER: ${{ env.BUILD_DEVICE }}\n          PKG_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n          bash .circleci/scripts/binary_upload.sh\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "       fail-fast: false",
        "       matrix:",
        "         platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]",
        "-        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]",
        "+        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu130' ]",
        "         exclude:",
        "-          # TODO (huydhn): Add cu130 aarch64 once PyTorch is on 2.9+ and",
        "-          # xformers is update to support 13.0",
        "           - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64",
        "             device: cu130",
        "     env:"
      ],
      "newLines": 8,
      "newStart": 167,
      "oldLines": 10,
      "oldStart": 167
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

            device: cu130

195. $ grep -n "windows_cuda\|windows.*12\|TODO.*12.9" /workspace/.github/scripts/generate_binary_build_matrix.py
196. $ git diff --stat HEAD
